film.title: Nil Battey Sannata
film.overview: Behind the magnificent Taj Mahal lies a cluster of dingy homes where Chanda (35), a domestic help, lives with her 14-year-old daughter Appu. Chanda aspires and dreams that her daughter will study and embrace a better fate. When Appu tells her she wants to quit school and become a maid like her, Chanda takes a strong decision: she will herself go back to school, and even join the class of her daughter.

dialogues.dialogue: All the kids Were staring at me, like.....I was committing a sin, and was caught red-handed. And everyone was staring at me with awe. I was feeling so ashamed. That's flue. But how was your first day?
You stole my friends too. I didn't steal your friends. They feel ashamed to he with you. What do you think? Only you can score good marks'?
I am a Collector. Many people come here. Aren't you ashamed ? I've been so polite for the past few days. Now will you understand when I abuse you'?
I slog all day and night for you. I break my back working for you, but you think I p**** myself. Aren't you ashamed'? Is that What you say? You stole my money and yelling at me instead.
Where will you stop, Apeksha'? I am sure...in the next exams...she will score a big zero. Zero. And make Sri Aryabhatt proud. I am really sad. It's sad for me.
